source: Te Whatu Ora Capitation Rates s.11 — Zero Fees for Under-14s
notes: Per-patient capitation. Paid on enrolled patients aged 0-13. The 5-14 band rate already nets out age 14 (eligibility cutoff) — apply the band rate to the whole 5-14 enrolment count.
Mutually exclusive with the U6 scheme (s.10). Practices that did not opt into Zero Fees for Under-14s receive U6 rates instead — see u6.json.
Reconciles to within 0.3% at Hillside Medical Centre and 0.03% at Blockhouse Bay Medical Centre (April 2026 ProCare reports), confirming both are on the U14 scheme.
